title: Receive webhook when app user token is revoked (e.g user is deactivated)
excerpt: I would like to request a webhook for user token changes (e.g user deactivation). The reason behind is that there is no way to indicate if the token for the user is revoked. Having webhook for that would allow the app to…

posts.author: dominik.czajka (Czajka)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to request a webhook for user token changes (e.g user deactivation). The reason behind is that there is no way to indicate if the token for the user is revoked. Having webhook for that would allow the app to handle this situation properly.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @dominik.czajka and welcome to the community!

Thank you for the request!

Everyone: you can vote on the top of the screen
